---
title: ""
sidebar: false
toc: false
layout: full
# listing:
#   - id: latest-news
#     contents: talks
#     sort: "date desc"
#     page-size: 3
#     max-items: 3
#     template: theme/ejs/homepage-news.ejs
#     type: custom
#     categories: false
#     sort-ui: false
#     filter-ui: false
#     fields: [date, title]
#     feed: false
execute:
  freeze: true
---

<!-- color: rgb(132, 45, 245); -->

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
## [[**Siddharth**]{style="font-weight: 450; color: var(--highlightColor);"} Vishwanath]{style="font-size: 35px; font-weight: 100;"}
:::


::::: {.columns}





:::: {.column width="35%"}

<div class="juxtapose" data-startingposition="40%" style="max-width: 300px !important; align-items: center; margin: 0 auto;">
<img src="images/profile7-3.png" data-label="" alt="">
<img src="images/profile7.png" data-label="" alt="">
</div>

::: {style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.5em; margin-top: 10px;"}
[<i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i> ](https://linkedin.com/in/sidv23) ·
[<i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> ](https://github.com/sidv23) ·
[<i class="ai ai-google-scholar-square"></i> ](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7TQaHEEAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;"}
[<i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i>]() svishwanath [at] ucsd [dot] edu
:::
::::





:::: {.column width="5%"}
::::






:::: {.column width="60%"}
I am a Stefan E. Warschawski [:Visiting Assistant Professor](#x-vap){style="color: var(--highlightColor);"} in the [Department of Mathematics](https://www.math.ucsd.edu/) at [UC San Diego](https://www.ucsd.edu/), mentored by [Ery Arias-Castro](https://mathweb.ucsd.edu/~eariasca/).

I completed my Ph.D. at [Penn State University](https://www.psu.edu/), advised by [Bharath Sriperumbudur](https://bharathsv.github.io/), where my dissertation was recognized with the [Alumni Association Dissertation Award](https://science.psu.edu/news/2023-alumni-association-dissertation-awards). During my time at Penn State, I was also a research assistant and consultant with the [Statistical Consulting Center](https://scc.stat.psu.edu/).

My research interests lie in the intersection of the following areas:

* **Inference from relational data** 
  * multidimensional scaling
  * embedding methods for graphs
  * network data analysis

* **Topological data analysis** 
  * robust topological inference
  * statistical inference from topological summaries and Betti numbers

* **Statistical learning** 
  * differential privacy in statistics and machine learning
  * reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces in probability and statistics

* **Sampling** 
  * MCMC and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo
  * generative models

Prior to academia, I worked as a quantitative researcher at Goldman Sachs, and as a model validation quant at Nomura. I graduated from the [Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur](https://www.iitk.ac.in/) with a degree in Mathematics and Statistics.
::::


:::::


## :x vap
A _Visiting Assistant Professor_ in a Math department is a postdoctoral position with (sometimes) better parking privileges.


<!-- {{< bi arrow-bar-right color="#047a06" >}} *[All Posts](blog.qmd)* -->
